# polaris_data_security_policy (Data Source)

The `polaris_data_security_policy` data source is used to access information
about a data security policy in RSC. A data security policy is looked up using
either the policy ID or the name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Name of the data security policy.
- `policy_id` (String) Data security policy ID (UUID).

### Read-Only

- `category` (String) Category of the data security policy.
- `description` (String) Description of the data security policy.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the data security policy is enabled.
- `filter` (Block List) Filter configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `id` (String) Data security policy ID (UUID).
- `predefined` (Boolean) Whether the data security policy is predefined.
- `severity` (String) Severity of the data security policy.
- `threshold_filter` (Block List) Threshold filter configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold_filter))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Read-Only:

- `condition` (Block List) Filter condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--condition))
- `group` (Block List) Nested filter group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--group))
- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR).

<a id="nestedblock--filter--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.condition`

Read-Only:

- `filter_type` (String) Filter type.
- `relationship` (String) Comparison operator.
- `values` (List of String) Filter values.


<a id="nestedblock--filter--group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.group`

Read-Only:

- `condition` (Block List) Filter condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--group--condition))
- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR).

<a id="nestedblock--filter--group--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.group.condition`

Read-Only:

- `filter_type` (String) Filter type.
- `relationship` (String) Comparison operator.
- `values` (List of String) Filter values.

- `group` (Block List) Nested filter group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold_filter--group))
- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR).

<a id="nestedblock--threshold_filter--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `threshold_filter.condition`
